title: Unbelievable HRV tracking & battery life
comment: The Nova Ring Air has completely replaced two bulky wearables I used to wear. The sleep stage recovery algorithm is incredibly accurate, and the titanium chassis feels virtually weightless.

title: Minimalist aesthetics and solid build quality
comment: Shipped within 24 hours in sleek recycled packaging. The fit and finish on the titanium is top notch.

title: Stunning 3D spatial viewport for CAD work
comment: The HoloSphere display is a game changer for spatial modeling. Zero latency optical tracking works seamlessly with Thunderbolt 4.
